t_ch: 佩佩朝你笑了笑，尾巴摇动得比之前还要欢快。
t_en: Peppy smiles at you, its tail wagging more profusely than before with happiness.

t_ch: （走吧！）
t_en: (Let's go!)

t_ch: （救命呀！）
t_en: (Help!)

t_ch: 见义勇为。
t_en: Lend a hand

t_ch: 谢谢你们救了我！
t_en: Thank you for saving me!

t_ch: 拿走的东西该还回来了。
t_en: What was taken should be returned now.

t_ch: 你是说，那个奇怪的罐头吗？
t_en: You mean, that strange can?

t_ch: 拿你偷走的奇物报答吧。
t_en: Hand over the Curio you stole as compensation.

t_ch: 「奇物」是什么？
t_en: What is a Curio?

t_ch: 噢，你们是说我那个灰扑扑的罐头吗？
t_en: Oh, you guys are talking about that dusty gray can of mine?

t_ch: 这东西我见过，但不是我偷的，我连碰的资格都没有呢。
t_en: I've seen it before, but I didn't steal it. I don't even have the right to touch it.

t_ch: 你这话什么意思？
t_en: What do you mean?

t_ch: 不是你偷的，那是谁偷的？
t_en: If it wasn't you, then who stole it?

t_ch: 是「管家」偷的。
t_en: It was the butler.

t_ch: 管家是谁？
t_en: Who's the butler?

t_ch: 我看到过它拿那个「罐头」把玩，它很凶，连看都不让我看。
t_en: I saw it playing with that "can." It was fiercely protective with it too, and it wouldn't let me even glance at it.

t_ch: 这家伙就是个大骗子，它说自己是阮•梅女士的助手，阮•梅女士派它来管理大家。
t_en: That guy is a big fat liar. It said it was Ruan Mei's assistant, and that Ruan Mei dispatched it here to manage everyone.

t_ch: 我和我的小伙伴就是因为质疑它，才被赶到这里来…可惜，其他人都相信它那套说辞。
t_en: My buddies and I were banished here because we doubted it... Such a shame that everyone else believed its lies.

t_ch: （我们要找到「管家」要回奇物……）
t_en: (We have to find the butler and retrieve the Curio...)

t_ch: 你们要找它？恐怕有点麻烦，它把控着房间的出入权，恐怕不会让你进去。
t_en: You're looking for it? That's gonna be hard, I'm afraid. It controls access to and from the room, and it won't let you in.

t_ch: 关于管家，你还知道什么？
t_en: What do you know about the butler?

t_ch: 我知道的只有这些了。不过，我的伙伴们也跟它打过交道。
t_en: That's all I know. But, my buddies have also interacted with it.

t_ch: 可惜我们走散了，或许…你可以去找找看，或许它们会知道点什么。
t_en: It's a pity we all got scattered, or... You could go look for them — they might know something.

t_ch: 熟悉的场景……
t_en: Feeling déjà vu...

t_ch: （门禁系统彻底坏了汪！）
t_en: (The access control system is completely done for, woof!)

t_ch: 开启同步模式。
t_en: Activate sync mode.

t_ch: （这门卡住了汪！别乱动，这门很重，会砸伤你的！还是同步到我身上来吧！）
t_en: (The door's stuck, woof! Don't move unnecessarily! The door might fall on you! Better sync up with me!)

t_ch: （同步成功了……）
t_en: (Sync successful...)

t_ch: （放心！这套设备非常稳定！）
t_en: (Don't worry! This device set is super stable!)

t_ch: 诶？
t_en: ...Hmm?

t_ch: 关于管家，你还知道什么？
t_en: What do you know about the butler?

t_ch: 「管家」啊，它总是自吹自擂， 说自己<color=#dbc291ff>「通过终端和阮•梅女士保持联系」</color>。
t_en: The butler's always tooting its own horn, saying that it <color=#dbc291ff>keeps in touch with Ruan Mei via the terminal</color>.

t_ch: 它还说，自己是阮•梅女士独一无二的创造，和我们不一样，它是一种更高级的生命，没有生理需求，所以<color=#dbc291ff>不需要进食</color>。
t_en: It also said that it was a unique creation from Madam Ruan Mei's, unlike us, and that it's a higher lifeform without biological needs, so it <color=#dbc291ff>doesn't need food</color>.

t_ch: 我记得的，只有这些了。
t_en: That's all I recall.

t_ch: （收到！线索加一！）
t_en: (Got it! One more clue!)

t_ch: （我们去其他地方转转吧。）
t_en: (Let's go take a look somewhere else.)

t_ch: 熟悉的场景……
t_en: Feeling déjà vu...

t_ch: （神探佩佩来咯！）
t_en: (Super Detective Peppy has arrived!)

t_ch: 开启同步模式。
t_en: Activate sync mode.

t_ch: （前面危险，千万要躲开，别被它们发现了！）
t_en: (Danger up ahead. Avoid at all costs. Don't get spotted by them!)

t_ch: （被发现了！快跑！）
t_en: (We've been made! Run!)

t_ch: （好险啊，可别再被它们逮到了。）
t_en: (That was close. Don't get caught by them again.)

t_ch: （这里…有人吗……）
t_en: (Is there... someone here...)

t_ch: 是有人在求救吗？
t_en: Is someone calling for help?

t_ch: （这里有陌生的气息，咱们过去看看吧。）
t_en: (There's a strange air about here. We should take a look.)

t_ch: （刚刚是你在叫吗？）
t_en: (Were you the one calling out just now?)

t_ch: 有人吗？我好冷…好寂寞……
t_en: Anyone there? I'm so cold... So lonely...

t_ch: 你知道「管家」的事吗？
t_en: Do you know about the butler?

t_ch: 对方别有深意地看了你一眼，沉吟了片刻。
t_en: It gazes at you profoundly and mutters to itself for a moment.

t_ch: 这家伙信众很多，你得<color=#dbc291ff>当面揭穿它的谎言</color>才行。
t_en: This fellow has many believers, so you'll have to <color=#dbc291ff>expose its lies</color>.

t_ch: 最好还是<color=#dbc291ff>去它身边调查</color>看看吧，或许会有收获。
t_en: It'd be better to <color=#dbc291ff>investigate by its side</color> — we may have some luck.

t_ch: 我认识你…你别靠太近。
t_en: I know you... You shouldn't get too close.

t_ch: 关于管家，你还知道什么？
t_en: What do you know about the butler?

t_ch: 我和大家…都是被它赶出来的，它不让我们回去。
t_en: Everyone and I... were driven out by it. It wouldn't let us return.

t_ch: 说什么<color=#dbc291ff>「怪物破坏了大门的锁，门开不了。」</color>
t_en: It said something about <color=#dbc291ff>monsters destroying the door's lock and causing it to get stuck.</color>

t_ch: 至于其他的，我就不清楚了。
t_en: I'm not too sure about the rest.

t_ch: （收到！线索加一！）
t_en: (Got it! One more clue!)

t_ch: 对了，我有个朋友，它也知道一些内情，不过它性格孤僻，不愿意和我们过多来往，我也不知道它现在在哪儿。
t_en: By the way, I have a friend who knows some stuff behind-the-scenes, but it's a lone wolf and doesn't mingle with us often, so I don't know where it is.

t_ch: 你要是有机会，可以去找找它，说不定它今天心情好，愿意跟你聊两句。
t_en: If you have a chance, go look for it. If it's in a good mood, it might exchange a word or two.

t_ch: （这个舱段还藏着别的造物？{NICKNAME}，我们该怎么办？）
t_en: (There are other creations hidden in this zone? {NICKNAME}, what shall we do?)

t_ch: 我们已经见过它了。
t_en: We've seen it before.

t_ch: 知道了，我再去找找。
t_en: Got it, I'll keep looking.

t_ch: 不了，我们还得回去复命。
t_en: Nah, we need to report back.

t_ch: 好吧，那就再见。
t_en: Alright, see you around.

t_ch: （{NICKNAME}，「管家」的事，我要回去问问小姐，等查什么了，我再喊你。）
t_en: ({NICKNAME}, I'll have to ask Missy about the butler. I'll let you know when I've found something.)

t_ch: 汪汪！汪汪汪！
t_en: Woof woof! Woof woof woof!

t_ch: 查到「管家」的下落了？
t_en: You've found the butler's whereabouts?

t_ch: （我知道那家伙在哪儿了，就躲在禁闭舱段里！）
t_en: (I know where it is — it's hiding in the seclusion zone!)

t_ch: （{NICKNAME}，佩佩知道你最厉害了，能不能陪我去……）
t_en: ({NICKNAME}, Peppy knows you're the strongest. Can you come with me...)

t_ch: 小狗满怀期待看着你，它歪着头，眼睛闪闪发光。
t_en: The puppy gazes at you expectantly, tilting its head, its eyes shimmering.

t_ch: 真是拿你没办法。
t_en: Fine, I'll play along.

t_ch: 佩佩朝你摇了摇它的小尾巴。
t_en: Peppy wags its little tail at you.

t_ch: 当然，还得是我！
t_en: It has to be me, of course!

t_ch: 佩佩瞪大了双眼，被你的自信所震慑。
t_en: Peppy widens its eyes, awed by your confidence.

t_ch: （事不宜迟，走吧！）
t_en: (Time is of the essence. Let's go!)

t_ch: （我闻到房间里有几丝「分装快乐」的味道，进去看看吧。）
t_en: (I caught a few whiffs of the Joy Filtration Set in the room. Let's go in and take a look.)

t_ch: 这里什么也没有啊。
t_en: There's nothing here.

t_ch: （味道很淡，可能不超过<unbreak>20</unbreak>个黑塔系统时。）
t_en: (The scent is faint, probably no more than <unbreak>20</unbreak> Herta system hours.)

t_ch: （这里是监控室，可能只是拿在身上路过的…也可能是在这里暂存过？）
t_en: (This is the monitoring room. It could be carried by someone who was passing by... or it could have been stored here?)

t_ch: （…哎我的狗脑子转不过来了，还是去找「管家」吧。）
t_en: (...Brr, my puppy brain just can't seem to understand. Let's go and find the butler instead.)

t_ch: （走吧，先出去看看。）
t_en: (Let's go and take a look.)

t_ch: 你和佩佩转身准备离去，自动门升起，却尴尬地停滞在半空中。
t_en: As you and Peppy turn to leave, the automatic door rises, yet suspends awkwardly in midair.

t_ch: 门又坏了…
t_en: The door malfunctioned again...

t_ch: （这套门禁系统还能不能好了。）
t_en: (Is this access control system going to be any good?)

t_ch: （我记得安保系统后台可以控制门的开关，我钻出去瞧瞧？）
t_en: (I remember that the backend of the security system controls the opening of doors. Let me go in and take a look?)

t_ch: 开启同步模式。
t_en: Activate sync mode.

t_ch: （走吧。）
t_en: (Let's go.)

t_ch: （等等，先别急着进去，它们好像看到我们了，都在盯着你呢。）
t_en: (Wait, don't rush in. I think they've seen us — they are all staring at you.)

t_ch: （还是老规矩……）
t_en: (Same old rules...)

t_ch: 啊啊啊啊我要变身！
t_en: Ahhh... I want to transform!

t_ch: 佩佩号！出击！
t_en: Peppy! Attack!

t_ch: （别说怪话了，小点声，别打草惊蛇。）
t_en: (Don't say weird things. Just lower your volume. Don't act rashly.)

t_ch: （走吧。）
t_en: (Let's go.)

t_ch: （打听「管家」的秘密）
t_en: (Inquire about the butler's secret)

t_ch: 啊，这…这我不好说。
t_en: Ah, that's... that's hard for me to say.

t_ch: 造物向你使了个眼色，暗示你「管家」不让它多说。
t_en: The creation gives you a look that indicates the "butler" did not permit it to say too much.

t_ch: （打听「管家」的秘密）
t_en: (Inquire about the butler's secret)

t_ch: 不知道诶，这种事你还是问别人去吧。
t_en: I don't know. It's better if you ask someone else about it.

t_ch: 造物拒绝和你沟通，这似乎是「管家」下的命令。
t_en: The creation refuses to communicate with you. This seems to be an order from the "butler."

t_ch: 与其他终端不一样的是，这台终端与外界联系——基于数据保密原则，其他终端仅限在内网使用。
t_en: Unlike other terminals, this terminal can contact the outside world — due to data protection, other terminals are limited within the intranet.

t_ch: 查询使用记录
t_en: Check usage logs

t_ch: 你调取了终端的使用记录，但最近的对外通讯记录却是空白一片。
t_en: You pull the terminal's usage logs, but the most recent extra-communication logs are empty.

t_ch: 算了，还是不碰了。
t_en: Forget it. Better not touch it.

t_ch: 一个平平无奇的冲水马桶，你决定——
t_en: An ordinary-looking toilet. You decide to...

t_ch: 让佩佩钻到马桶里。
t_en: Let Peppy go into the toilet bowl.

t_ch: 你决定让佩佩钻到马桶里，但很可惜，以它的小短腿，努力过却并未成功。
t_en: You decide to let Peppy burrow into the toilet. Sadly, with its short little legs, the effort is in vain.

t_ch: 让佩佩把自己冲走。
t_en: Let Peppy flush itself.

t_ch: 你想起那个名为「新世界大门」的奇物，你说服了佩佩。
t_en: You remember the "Door to A New World" Curio and convince Peppy.

t_ch: 但很可惜，它连冲水按钮都够不着。
t_en: What a pity! It can't even reach the flush.

t_ch: 有点恶心，还是别碰了。
t_en: Kinda gross. Don't touch it.

t_ch: 你决定回头跟艾丝妲说一下，找个机会给佩佩洗个澡。
t_en: You decide to tell Asta later on to give Peppy a bath.

t_ch: 一碟散发着淡淡香气的糕点，看上去没有被吃过的痕迹，放在桌子上太浪费了。
t_en: A plate of delectable pastries. It looks like it hasn't been eaten. It is too wasteful to leave on the table.

t_ch: 佩佩将它揣进了背包中，多节俭的狗狗啊，不知道它会不会把平时散落的每一颗狗粮都捡起吃掉。
t_en: Peppy tucks it into the backpack. What a thrifty puppy! I wonder if it'll usually pick and eat all the scattered dog food?

t_ch: 你好呀？
t_en: Hello?

t_ch: （打听「管家」的秘密）
t_en: (Inquire about the butler's secret)

t_ch: 你说这个我听不懂哦。
t_en: I don't understand what you're saying.

t_ch: 我的肚肚很饿，你要是能搞来美味的点心投喂我，那我就能听懂了。
t_en: My tummy is growling. If you can get me a tasty treat, then I might be able to understand.

t_ch: 吃起来有种被爱的感觉，让我想起了伟大的阮•梅女士……
t_en: It tastes like the feeling of being loved — this reminds me of the great Miss Ruan Mei...

t_ch: 这家伙根本不是它所吹嘘的那样，<color=#dbc291ff>什么不用进食，它特别喜欢吃炒饭</color>，我亲眼看到过好几次。
t_en: This guy is full of hot air, <color=#dbc291ff>claiming to not need food. It loves to eat fried rice</color> — I have seen it with my own eyes.

t_ch: 它把炒饭藏起来，背着我们偷吃！
t_en: It hides the fried rice, and eats it behind our backs!

t_ch: 哼哼，<color=#dbc291ff>炒饭被它标记过</color>，那味道…你随便找个人闻闻就知道是它，绝对抵赖不掉！
t_en: Hmph, <color=#dbc291ff>the fried rice is marked by it</color>, and that scent... Anyone who smells it can identify it. There is no denying it!

t_ch: 贪吃的「阮•梅」造物为你指明了某处。
t_en: This gourmand creation points you somewhere.

t_ch: 这附近的植株叶片与土壤上有可疑的油光——
t_en: There is a suspiciously greasy sheen on the leaves and soil in the surrounding area...

t_ch: 在你的指挥下，佩佩伸出短短的狗爪子，熟练地在种植区的土壤里刨了起来。
t_en: At your command, Peppy extends its short dog paws and skillfully digs into the planting area.

t_ch: 一个盒子散发着古怪的香味——
t_en: A box is emitting an odd aroma...

t_ch: 去去去，哪里来的狗。
t_en: Shoo shoo shoo, where did this dog come from?

t_ch: （和这家伙讲不通，还是等你来给它点教训吧。）
t_en: (Can't get through to this guy. Better wait for you to lecture him.)

t_ch: 新面孔？你是…空间站的科员？
t_en: New face? Are you... a space station researcher?

t_ch: 少废话，把奇物还回来。
t_en: Enough of that. Hand over the Curio.

t_ch: 什么奇物？我根本就不知道你在说什么。
t_en: What Curio? I have no idea what you are talking about.

t_ch: 反倒是你们二位，怪物屡次袭击下，我们可是一直锁着门的，你们是怎么溜进来的，不解释一下吗？
t_en: The two of you, on the other hand — there are monsters rampaging outside, and we've kept the door locked up all this time. How'd the two of you get in? Care to explain?

t_ch: 门禁就是你弄坏的！
t_en: You are the one who broke the access control!

t_ch: 压根就没有怪物袭击一事！
t_en: There never was a monster attack!

t_ch: 管家大人，这是真的吗？
t_en: Mister Butler, is this real?

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Ah?

t_ch: 嘘，稍安勿躁。我是阮•梅女士的助手， 我身负管理大家的重责，我怎么可能欺骗大家呢？
t_en: Shh, hold your horses. I am Miss Ruan Mei's assistant, and I am responsible for managing everyone. How can I possibly lie to everyone?

t_ch: 你的身份也是假的。
t_en: Your identity is also fake.

t_ch: 啊？这这这，这是真的吗？
t_en: Ah? Is this true!?

t_ch: 安静！
t_en: Quiet!

t_ch: 阮•梅女士教导过我，真理越辩越明，真相亦如是。既然今天大家都在，那咱们就来辩个清楚——
t_en: Miss Ruan Mei taught me. The more you debate, the clearer the truth becomes. Since we are all here today, let's have a debate!

t_ch: （你这家伙撒谎成性，我们今天就要来会会你！）
t_en: (Lying is second nature to this guy. Today we're going to show him who's boss!)

t_ch: （帮帮我，{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#大哥}！）
t_en: (Help me, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}!)

t_ch: 本来…基于阮•梅女士教导我的社交礼仪，我应该与新来的客人简单寒暄几句的。
t_en: Actually, based on the social etiquette that Miss Ruan Mei taught me, I should have exchanged pleasantries with the new guests.

t_ch: 你知道吗，阮•梅女士在制造我时使用了珍稀材料，这使我先天拥有极高的道德！我的人品，毋庸置疑！
t_en: Did you know, Miss Ruan Mei created me using rare materials. This makes me innately highly ethical! My character is unquestionable!

t_ch: 你说我有不道德行为，说我故意锁门把大家关在这儿，真是可笑——门禁开关安得这么高，我够都够不着！
t_en: Your claim of me behaving immorally, deliberately locking the door to trap everyone here is laughable. The access control switch is installed so high that I can't even reach it!

t_ch: 对未知时刻报以无穷的好奇，这就是推动科技发展的源动力。如果说好奇也有罪，那我认罪。
t_en: The thirst towards the unknown is what advances technology. If curiosity is a sin, then I plead guilty.

t_ch: 你注意到围观的「阮•梅」造物似乎并没有动摇。
t_en: You notice that the onlooking creations of Ruan Mei do not seem to be wavering.

t_ch: 质疑
t_en: Interrogate

t_ch: 阮•梅女士真的教过你这个吗？
t_en: Miss Ruan Mei really taught you this?

t_ch: 这不是文明生物的正常礼仪吗？你连这个都不知道？
t_en: Is this not normal etiquette for civilized beings? You don't even know this?

t_ch: 我不清楚你们究竟看不惯我哪一点，但是我从阮•梅女士身上学到了待人的耐心，有什么质疑，尽管放马过来，咱们一条条辩清楚！
t_en: I am unsure what is it about me that you dislike, but I've learned patience from Miss Ruan Mei. If you have a problem, then let it be known. Let's hash it out one by one!

t_ch: 质疑
t_en: Interrogate

t_ch: 极高的道德？我还获得过崇高道德的赞许呢，你有吗？连这东西都没有，你根本不配说自己有道德！
t_en: Extremely high morals? I've even received Praise of High Morals! Have you had them? If you don't even have that, then you are not fit to say you have morals!

t_ch: 我生而高贵，有阮•梅女士对我的赞赏就够了！
t_en: I am high-born, and it is enough that I receive praise from Miss Ruan Mei!

t_ch: （好像不对，先天的一切都需要后天的培养，它跳过了它的自主行为没说，这里面肯定有问题！）
t_en: (Something is not right. Everything innate still needs to be nurtured. It didn't mention anything about its motivation. There must be something wrong here!)

t_ch: 质疑
t_en: Interrogate

t_ch: 够不着就不能锁门吗？万一你跳起来了呢？又或者是谁托举你呢？
t_en: Who says that you can't lock the door when it is out of your reach? What if you can jump? Or with someone lifting you up?

t_ch: 你干脆说我能膨胀变大，瞬间长成五米高算了，反正都是污蔑，没差。
t_en: You might as well say I can expand and grow 5 meters tall instantly? It's all slander anyway. Who cares?

t_ch: （不对，门禁是自动感应的，由安保机器人管理！{NICKNAME}，它是在故意带偏话题，<color=#dbc291ff>我们有什么证据可以打它脸吗？</color>）
t_en: (That's not right. The access control system is auto-sensing and managed by security robots! {NICKNAME}, it is purposely diverting the topic. <color=#dbc291ff>What evidence do we have as rebuttal?</color>)

t_ch: 出示
t_en: Present Evidence

t_ch: 我们有证据！这是安保机器人提供的监控画面！
t_en: We have evidence! Here is the surveillance footage provided by the security robot!

t_ch: 对着门禁系统鬼鬼祟祟的人就是你！
t_en: The one that's acting suspiciously toward the access control system is you!

t_ch: 门禁系统？我之前没见过这东西，路过的时候有些好奇，就摸了摸。
t_en: Access controls? I have never seen this. It piqued my interest when I walked past it, so I touched it.

t_ch: 质疑
t_en: Interrogate

t_ch: （那是人类社会的事，你又不是人类……）
t_en: (That's something for human society, and you're not human...)

t_ch: …你要不要看看你是什么物种？
t_en: ...Do you even see what kind of species you are?

t_ch: 出示。（使用错误的情况）
t_en: Present evidence. (For when evidence is used incorrectly)

t_ch: 哼，我们手里可是有证据的，你看看这个！
t_en: Hmph, we have the evidence. Look at this!

t_ch: 呃？这和我说的话有什么相干吗？
t_en: Huh? What does this have to do with what I said?

t_ch: 你和我们不是一个物种，我们内里的「馅」决定了我们的性格与品德，阮•梅女士不断探索着生命的进阶形态，所以才创造出了独一无二的我。
t_en: You and I, we are not the same species. The "stuffing" inside us determines our character and integrity. Miss Ruan Mei's endless pursuit in advancing lifeforms has led to the creation of the unique being that is me.

t_ch: 同为「阮•梅」造物，我有多独特呢？比如说——阮•梅女士不希望我被低级的生理需求所困，所以我连进食都不需要！
t_en: How unique am I as a fellow Ruan Mei's creation? For example, Miss Ruan Mei does not wish for me to be affected by lowly physical needs, so I do not even need to eat!

t_ch: 围观的「阮•梅」造物们发出阵阵惊叹，你隐隐听到它们在讨论着人品与食物的议题。
t_en: Ruan Mei's creations huddle around and discuss something in astonishment. You can faintly hear them discussing character traits and food.

t_ch: 质疑
t_en: Interrogate

t_ch: 我感觉你也没多独特…还不如佩佩呢。
t_en: You're not that special... You can't even compare to Peppy.

t_ch: 就是！
t_en: Yeah!

t_ch: 质疑
t_en: Interrogate

t_ch: （不需要进食就算高级？那小机器人岂不是比佩佩还高级？呸呸呸！）
t_en: (Not needing food means it's advanced? Then the little robot is more advanced than Peppy? Phooey!)

t_ch: 我很抱歉，从物种的复杂程度上说，的确如此……
t_en: I'm sorry, from the complexity of the species, it should be...

t_ch: （这些「阮•梅」造物明明也会吃东西的，它肯定在撒谎！<color=#dbc291ff>我们有什么证据可以打它脸吗？</color>）
t_en: (These creations of Ruan Mei clearly eat. It's definitely lying!<color=#dbc291ff> What evidence do we have as rebuttal?</color>)

t_ch: 出示
t_en: Present Evidence

t_ch: 「不需要进食」？那这是什么？跟大家解释解释呗！
t_en: Not needing food? What is this? Explain yourself!

t_ch: （上面有你的信息素，你的同族都闻得到，这可抵赖不掉！）
t_en: (It has your scent on it, and your kin can all smell it. There is no denying it!)

t_ch: 我…只是想尝尝空间站科员们吃的食物，有些好奇…好奇心的事嘛，是这样的。
t_en: I... only wanted to try what the space station researchers would eat. I am curious... And when you're curious, it's like that.

t_ch: 出示。
t_en: Present evidence.

t_ch: 哼，我们手里可是有证据的，你看看这个！
t_en: Hmph, we have the evidence. Look at this!

t_ch: 呃？这和我说的话有什么相干吗？
t_en: Huh? What does this have to do with what I said?

t_ch: 这是由阮•梅女士决定的，评判标准不在于你。
t_en: This is decided by Madam Ruan Mei. You are not the judge of that.

t_ch: 咳咳，或许我在私德上有亏，但阮•梅女士委派给我的事务，我尽力做到了最好，从未欺骗过大家一丝一毫。
t_en: Ahem, maybe there is something wrong with my ethics, but whatever Ruan Mei assigns me, I will do my best. I have never lied to anyone.

t_ch: 她和我一直通过终端保持联系，她委托我代她管理大家，我向她汇报了大家的表现，她说对我非常满意。
t_en: She and I have always communicated through the terminal. She entrusts me to manage everyone. I've reported everyone's performance to her, and she is very pleased with me.

t_ch: 围观的「阮•梅」造物们大为震撼，这才发现自己被骗多时，怒不可遏。
t_en: The onlooking creations of Ruan Mei are extremely shocked — they are enraged at being lied to for so long.

t_ch: 质疑
t_en: Interrogate

t_ch: 你都承认自己私德有亏了，还好意思说没欺骗过大家？
t_en: You already admitted that you have poor ethics, and you still have the cheek to say that you did not lie to everyone?

t_ch: 一码归一码，好奇害死猫这种事很常见，我并没有否认过我在为人处世上偶有失误。但这并不是「欺骗」，我也从来没骗过大家。
t_en: That's a separate issue. Curiosity kills the cat. These things are common, and I've never denied that I make mistakes dealing with people. But this is not a lie, I have never lied to everyone.

t_ch: 我要是那种人，阮•梅女士怎么可能放心让我当「管家」呢？
t_en: If I were like that, why would Ruan Mei even let me be the butler?

t_ch: 质疑
t_en: Interrogate

t_ch: 汇报大家的表现？阮•梅又没给你们下达命令，需要汇报什么？一眼假！
t_en: Report everyone's performance? Ruan Mei never gave anyone orders. What is there to report? Lies!

t_ch: 不，你不了解她，她其实很关心我们，这里的一切，事无巨细，我都会向她汇报。
t_en: No, you don't understand her. She actually cares a lot about us. Everything that has happened, even the most trivial details, will be reported to her.

t_ch: 其实，她很关心大家，她说在离开之后，一直很想我们。
t_en: Actually, she cares a lot. Since she left, she's been missing everyone.

t_ch: 至于汇报的内容，最近吃了什么，做了什么，有什么烦恼，事无巨细，我都会整理好，再汇报给她。
t_en: I will tidy up the details of the report: Recent food intake, activities, or troubles. Matters big or small, I will report them back to her.

t_ch: (就凭它那小短手，用什么汇报？终端的键盘按得过来吗？）
t_en: (What is it going to report with those short hands? Can it even reach the terminal keyboard?)

t_ch: （它在转移话题，<color=#dbc291ff>我们有什么证明可以反驳它吗？</color>）
t_en: (It tries to divert the conversation. <color=#dbc291ff>What evidence do we have to present as rebuttal?</color>)

t_ch: 出示
t_en: Present Evidence

t_ch: 噢，你用终端和她联系。可是使用记录里压根没有你！
t_en: Oh, you used the terminal to communicate with her. But the communication history clearly does not reflect it!

t_ch: …我是通过别的设备和她沟通的。
t_en: ...I used other equipment to communicate with her.

t_ch: 这，这，我是通过别的设备和她沟通的。
t_en: I... I... I used other equipment to communicate with her.

t_ch: （你撒谎，能联络外界的终端就这一台！其他终端只能在内网使用！）
t_en: (You're lying. This is the only terminal that can communicate with the outside world! All the other terminals can only be used on the intranet!)

t_ch: 出示。
t_en: Present evidence.

t_ch: 哼，我们手里可是有证据的，你看看这个！
t_en: Hmph, we have the evidence. Look at this!

t_ch: 呃？这和我说的话有什么相干吗？
t_en: Huh? What does this have to do with what I said?

t_ch: 怎么不说话了，哑巴了？
t_en: Speechless? At a loss for words?

t_ch: （让你装，被戳穿了吧！）
t_en: (Your lies have been exposed!)

t_ch: 「管家」的谎言被你和佩佩一一戳穿，它呆立在原地，不知所措地望向你。
t_en: Peppy and you exposed the lies of the butler. It stands rooted to the ground, looking at you, distraught.

t_ch: 把奇物还回来！
t_en: Return the Curio!

t_ch: …我知道了，是我错了，对不起。
t_en: ...I know. It's my fault, and I'm sorry.

t_ch: 还要再辩下去吗？
t_en: Do you still want to debate over it?

t_ch: …不用了，我已经彻底输了。
t_en: ...No need, I have already lost.

t_ch: 东西就在后面里间，你们去拿吧…那里有个怪物游荡，我不敢靠近。
t_en: The thing is in the back. You can go get it... There are monsters roaming back there, so I dare not go near.

t_ch: 它沉默着，盯着地板上不存在的缝隙，恨不得想钻进去。
t_en: It keeps its silence, staring at the non-existent gaps in the floor, wishing it can hide within.

t_ch: 佩佩试图与它继续沟通，但它不再予以回应。
t_en: Peppy attempts to communicate with it, but it refuses to respond.

t_ch: （算了，别管它了。我们还是去拿回奇物吧，我先解除同步，你可以先放松下筋骨。）
t_en: (Forget it. Don't bother. Let's retrieve the Curio. I will desync now, and you can relax.)

t_ch: 佩佩解除了同步。
t_en: Peppy desynchronized.

t_ch: 汪！
t_en: Woof!

t_ch: 当前区域已关闭，请勿进入。
t_en: The area is closed. No entry.

t_ch: （帮我开下门！）
t_en: (Please open the door!)

t_ch: 不行，你没有权限。
t_en: (No, you have no authority.)

t_ch: （这家伙态度很强硬啊，我嘴笨，沟通这种事，还得指望你了！）
t_en: (This guy's attitude is pretty stubborn. I'm not good at communicating. Can you do the talking instead!)

t_ch: （让佩佩给它一个滑铲）
t_en: (Have Peppy give it a sliding tackle)

t_ch: （滑铲？我…我做不到啊……）
t_en: (Sliding tackle? I... I can't do it...)

t_ch: 佩佩低头看了看自己的爪子，又抬头看了看悬浮在空中的小机器人。
t_en: Peppy lowers its head and stares at its paws, then raises its head and stares at the little robot in the air.

t_ch: 请回吧。
t_en: Please leave.

t_ch: （向小机器人出示工牌）
t_en: (Show the name card to the little robot)

t_ch: （这是我的工牌，我要求打开自动门！）
t_en: (This is my name card. I demand you open the door!)

t_ch: 识别成功，确认为空间站工作人员。
t_en: Identity confirmed. Space Station Staff confirmed.

t_ch: 很抱歉，你属于非人生物，无法为您开启大门。
t_en: Sorry, you are non-human. Not authorized to open the door.

t_ch: （让佩佩用关机键威胁它）
t_en: (Have Peppy threaten it with the shutdown button)

t_ch: （再不开门，我就狠狠戳你的关机按钮，让你强制关机！）
t_en: (If you refuse to open the door, I will hit your shutdown button and force you to turn off!)

t_ch: 威胁有用的话，还要安保机器人做什么。
t_en: If threats worked, we wouldn't need security robots.

t_ch: 我就算倒下了，门禁系统也不会让你过的。
t_en: Even if I am down, the access control system will still not let you pass.

t_ch: （让佩佩报上你的名头）
t_en: (Let Peppy use your name)

t_ch: （我告诉你，你知道你把谁关在里面了吗？那可是 {NICKNAME}！）
t_en: (Do you know who you have trapped inside? That is {NICKNAME}!)

t_ch: （{NICKNAME}你该知道吧，那可是单手可取末日兽头颅的大能！）
t_en: (You should know {NICKNAME} — the one who has the power to single-handedly take on the Doomsday Beast!)

t_ch: （你要是不开门，我就让{NICKNAME}{F#大姐头}{M#大哥}破门而出，然后一球棒击穿你的外壳，打爆你的芯片，让火花在你的线路里乱窜！）
t_en: (If you don't open the door, I will get {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME} to break down this door, shatter your shell with a bat and smash your chip. That will send sparks down your wiring!)

t_ch: 小机器人发出嘎吱声，像是害怕，它在空中抖动了片刻，这才开口应答。
t_en: The little robot creaks as if afraid. It vibrates for an instant in midair before acquiescing.

t_ch: 门禁系统激活中，请稍等片刻。
t_en: Access control activation is in progress. Please hold.

t_ch: 门禁权限已转移，监控预警提示：最近三个月捕捉到异常人像记录，请留意！
t_en: Access control rights have been transferred. System alert: Warning! Signs of intruders have been detected across the past three months.

t_ch: （这是什么？上面这个身影是「管家」？还是它们一伙的？）
t_en: (What is this? Is that figure the butler? They are working together?)

t_ch: （它<color=#dbc291ff>在对门禁系统做什么？等等，难道这是它做的手脚</color>？！）
t_en: (What did it do to <color=#dbc291ff>the access control system? Wait, did it tamper with it!?</color>)

t_ch: （门开了！我这就解除同步，{NICKNAME}你赶紧出来！）
t_en: (The door is open! I'm going to desync now. {NICKNAME}, hurry up and get out!)

t_ch: 佩佩解除了同步。
t_en: Peppy desynchronized.

t_ch: （感应系统没反应，大门被锁死了，<color=#dbc291ff>从这里是进不去的</color>。）
t_en: (The sensory system is not working, and the door is locked.<color=#dbc291ff> There is no way in from here</color>.)

t_ch: （<color=#dbc291ff>我们还是绕去另一边</color>吧，那边的感应门是正常的。）
t_en: (<color=#dbc291ff>Let's go around to the other side, </color>where the motion sensor door is working as normal.)
(Woof?)

t_ch: 还要继续查下去吗？
t_en: Do you want to go on?

t_ch: （我先问问小姐的意思吧，得回去跟她说一声。）
t_en: (Let me ask Miss Asta about her opinion. I have to go back and inform her.)

t_ch: （奇物被吃掉了，这么大的事…我得回去向小姐汇报了。）
t_en: (The Curio has been eaten, and this is big news... I have to report this to Miss Asta.)

t_ch: （调查奇物一事算是告一段落了，你接下来打算怎么办？）
t_en: (The investigation of the Curio has come to an end. What do you plan to do next?)

t_ch: （这个舱段的设施有问题，我担心会出什么意外…走，我送你回去。）
t_en: (There is something wrong with the facilities in this zone. I am worried that something might happen... Come! Let me bring you back.)

t_ch: 走吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: （神探佩佩——等等，差点忘记解除同步了！）
t_en: (Detective Peppy — hold on! Almost forgot to desynchronize!)

t_ch: 佩佩解除了同步。
t_en: Peppy desynchronized.

t_ch: 汪汪！
t_en: Woof woof!

t_ch: 接下来该怎么做？
t_en: What are you going to do?

t_ch: （你是人还是我是人？你问我？我还等着听你的命令呢！）
t_en: (Are you human or am I human? You are asking me? I'm still waiting for your commands!)

t_ch: （{NICKNAME}，「管家」的事，你有什么想法吗？）
t_en: ({NICKNAME}, regarding the butler situation, what do you think about all this?)

t_ch: 我也没头绪。
t_en: I have no idea.

t_ch: （…这样啊，还是回去问问小姐汪？）
t_en: (...Ah, should we return and ask Miss Asta, woof?)

t_ch: （嗅嗅嗅……）
t_en: (Sniff sniff...)

t_ch: （那家伙应该不在这个舱段，我得回去查查它在哪儿。）
t_en: (That guy can't be in this zone. I have to go back and find out where he is.)

t_ch: 那走呗？
t_en: Then let's go!

t_ch: （还是等我找小姐复命了再说吧，而且舱段封锁和修复也需要时间。）
t_en: (Let's wait until I report to Miss Asta. Also, the locking and repairing of the zone will take some time.)

t_ch: （今天的事多亏了你啊，{NICKNAME}。你是佩佩最靠谱的伙伴！）
t_en: (It's all thanks to you today, {NICKNAME}. You are Peppy's most reliable partner!)

t_ch: （我先解除同步了！你回去好好休息吧！有消息了我再喊你！）
t_en: (I will desynchronize now! You can go back and rest well! I will holler if I have any news!)

t_ch: 佩佩解除了同步。
t_en: Peppy desynchronized.

t_ch: 汪汪！
t_en: Woof woof!

t_ch: 我们这儿锁门了，你从哪里进来的？
t_en: Our door is locked. Where did you come from?

t_ch: （问他奇物的事）
t_en: (Ask him about the Curio)

t_ch: 听你这意思，是说我偷了你的东西？你知道我是谁吗，我怎么会干这种事！
t_en: Are you suggesting that I stole from you? Do you know who I am? How could I have done such a thing?

t_ch: 出去，这里不欢迎你！
t_en: Get out! You are not welcome here!

t_ch: 「管家」将你和佩佩赶了出去。
t_en: The butler kicked you and Peppy out.

t_ch: 汪汪！汪！
t_en: Woof woof! Woof!

t_ch: 你本想大摇大摆地走进去，但佩佩伸出短短的小腿拦住了你。
t_en: You want to saunter off, but Peppy stops you with its short legs.

t_ch: 佩佩看起来有话要跟你说。
t_en: Peppy looks like it has something to say to you.

t_ch: 啊啊啊啊我要变身！
t_en: Ahhh... I want to transform!

t_ch: 佩佩号！出击！
t_en: Peppy! Attack!

t_ch: （先别急着进去，它好像看到你了，让我来吧。）
t_en: (Don't rush in. It seems to have seen you. Let me go first.)

t_ch: 哪来的狗？去去去！
t_en: Where did this dog come from? Shoo, shoo!

t_ch: （这家伙好傲慢，实在没办法跟他沟通。）
t_en: (This guy seems so arrogant. It's hard to communicate with him.)

t_ch: （还是在附近先调查看看吧，说不定能找到什么有用的线索。）
t_en: (Search around the area. Maybe there are some useful clues.)

t_ch: 汪汪汪！
t_en: Woof woof woof!

t_ch: 汪汪！
t_en: Woof woof!

t_ch: 你从佩佩的眼神里看出了几分钦佩，几分赞赏。
t_en: You can see the admiration and appreciation from Peppy's gaze.

t_ch: 佩佩嗅了嗅「分装快乐」，尾巴摇得飞快，看来这就是丢失的奇物。
t_en: Peppy sniffs the Joy Filtration Set, its tail wagging furiously. Seems like this must be the missing Curio.

t_ch: 佩佩朝你伸出毛茸茸的爪子，示意你握住它的爪子。
t_en: Peppy extends a furry paw towards you, hinting you to grab it.

t_ch: 汪？
t_en: Woof?

t_ch: 佩佩难以置信地望着你。
t_en: Peppy stares at you in bewilderment.

t_ch: 汪汪汪！
t_en: Woof woof woof!

t_ch: 佩佩高兴地望着你。
t_en: Peppy stares at you happily.

t_ch: 佩佩朝你笑了笑，摇着尾巴示意你跟它一起离开这里。
t_en: Peppy smiles at you, wagging its tail, and signaling you to leave this place together.

t_ch: 走吧？
t_en: Let's go?

t_ch: 汪汪汪！
t_en: Woof woof woof!

t_ch: 佩佩高兴地望着你。
t_en: Peppy stares at you happily.

t_ch: （我们已经收集到足够的证据了，这下可以狠狠打「管家」的脸了。）
t_en: (We've collected enough evidence. Now we can go back and throw it in the butler's face.)

t_ch: （{NICKNAME}，我们回去再和他聊聊吧，看看他还有什么话要说，走！）
t_en: ({NICKNAME}, let's go talk to him more once we're back. We'll see what else he has to say. Let's go!)

t_ch: （打听「管家」的秘密）
t_en: (Inquire about the butler's secret)

t_ch: 我、我…不…你别过来…呜……
t_en: I—I... No... Don't come closer... Urk...

t_ch: 「管家」说外面来的…都是坏家伙…你…你别过来！
t_en: The "butler" said that everyone from the outside... are bad... You... Don't come any closer!

t_ch: 目睹了这一切的「阮•梅」造物们对「管家」感到极为不满，它们不愿再和它做朋友。
t_en: The Ruan Mei creations that have witnessed this are very upset at the "butler." They no longer want to be friends with it.

t_ch: 哎呀，你的表情好严肃！
t_en: Hey, lighten up! What's got you so serious?

t_ch: 你怎么在这里？！
t_en: What are you doing here?

t_ch: 这本书是怎么回事？
t_en: What's with the book?

t_ch: 你怎么变成纸片了？
t_en: How did you end up turning into paper?

t_ch: 不知道！人家正呼呼呢，一睁眼就到这儿来了。既然你也在，难道说……
t_en: No clue! I was deep in sleep, and the next thing I knew, I woke up here. Since you're here too, does that mean...

t_ch: 完全不知道！人家正呼呼呢，一睁眼就到这儿来了。既然你也在，难道说……
t_en: I have no clue! I was deep in sleep, and the next thing I knew, I woke up here. Since you're here too, does that mean...

t_ch: 纸片？哪有，这不还是毛茸茸的嘛！你摸摸看？
t_en: Paper? No way, I'm as fluffy as ever! Come on, give me a feel!

t_ch: 发生了什么？人家正呼呼呢，一睁眼就到这儿来了。既然你也在，难道说……
t_en: What in the world? I was deep in sleep, and the next thing I knew, I woke up here. Since you're here too, does that mean...

t_ch: 是我们心有灵犀，在梦里相见了？
t_en: Did our hearts connect in a dream?

t_ch: 太对了，就是这样。
t_en: Exactly, that's exactly it!

t_ch: 明显有别的原因！
t_en: There must be another explanation!

t_ch: 有没有办法不见？
t_en: Is there a way we can avoid meeting?

t_ch: 好可爱！心有灵犀！！
t_en: How cute! It's as if we're fated to be connected!

t_ch: 不知道！反正弄不清，先当成心有灵犀吧！
t_en: I have no idea! Everything's a bit fuzzy. Let's just say it's some kind of mystical bond for now!

t_ch: 啊？为什么！说这种话，就算人家不可能讨厌你，但也是会伤心的哦！
t_en: Why would you say that? Even if I couldn't hate you, that would still hurt my feelings!

t_ch: 虽然完全没有头绪，但人家好喜欢这个故事。人们说，梦是欧洛尼斯垂下的帷幕，这有没有可能是它送出的礼物？毕竟那位泰坦和我一样，特别喜欢你呢。
t_en: Although I'm completely in the dark, I adore this story. They say dreams are veils cast by Oronyx. Could this be a gift from them? It appears that Titan cherishes you just as much as I do.

t_ch: 我懂，睡前故事。
t_en: I get it. A bedtime story.

t_ch: 读书，好累…
t_en: Reading can be such a drag...

t_ch: 虽然但是，有奖励吗？
t_en: But still, is there any reward for this?

t_ch: 睡前故事，喜欢！念给人家听！
t_en: I love bedtime stories! Please, read one to me!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，变灰了！别怕，人家会夸夸你，施展粉红色的魔法哦！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you've turned gray! Don't worry, I'll cheer you up and sprinkle a little pink magic!

t_ch: 当然，不仅有奖励，还有许多人家的鼓励哦！夸夸你！
t_en: Absolutely, not only is there a reward, but you'll also get plenty of cheers from me! Well done!

t_ch: 人家有种预感，刚才那颗漂亮的星星，也许就是带来故事的宝物。在今后的旅途中，我们还会遇见好多好多。
t_en: I've got a hunch that the beautiful star we just saw is a treasure that brings stories. In our travels ahead, we're sure to encounter many more.

t_ch: 所以睁大眼睛，一起来读书吧！我们要收集好多好多睡前故事，然后——{NICKNAME}，你来念给人家听！
t_en: So, let's keep our eyes peeled and dive into reading together! We need to collect tons of bedtime stories — then, {NICKNAME}, you can read them to me!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我有点好奇，以前，你们的旅行是走走停停的吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I've been wondering, did you used to take breaks during your travels?

t_ch: 是，我讲究劳逸结合。
t_en: I believe in a work-life balance.

t_ch: 不，「开拓」永不停歇。
t_en: No, "Trailblaze" never rests.

t_ch: 有些事不是我能决定的。
t_en: Some things are beyond my control.

t_ch: 这样啊。那看来，翁法罗斯的忙碌日子也要暂时告一段落了。有空就在浴宫泡泡澡吧！香喷喷的！
t_en: It seems like Amphoreus' hectic days are winding down. Why not take a moment to unwind in the bath chamber? It's really relaxing!

t_ch: 好有活力！但人家总觉得，翁法罗斯的忙碌日子似乎要暂时告一段落了。这样也好，步调慢下来，生活才更放松。
t_en: Such energy! But it seems like Amphoreus' hectic days are winding down. That's a good thing. Slowing down helps to relax and enjoy life.

t_ch: 好深奥的发言呢。人家总觉得，翁法罗斯的忙碌日子似乎要暂时告一段落了。这样也好，生活就是既有命中注定，也有许多突然的奇遇。
t_en: Such a profound statement. I feel like Amphoreus' hectic days are winding down. That's fine, life is about destined paths and unexpected adventures.

t_ch: 接下来，可能会一段时间没有新的故事了。
t_en: There might not be new stories for a while.

t_ch: 要花时间构思的。
t_en: Great tales take time to craft.

t_ch: 急死了！
t_en: I'm getting impatient!

t_ch: 下个版本就会有了。
t_en: They'll be in the next update.

t_ch: 为了这些特别的故事，人家会耐心等待哦，就在梦里…你也会回来的，对不对？
t_en: I'll wait patiently for these enchanting tales, right here in dreamland... You're coming back, aren't you?

t_ch: 人家也好急！但现在能做的，似乎也只有耐心等待了，就在梦里…你也会回来的，对不对？
t_en: I'm so eager, too! But for now, waiting patiently in dreamland is all I can do... You will return, won't you?

t_ch: 什么本？也是书吗？{NICKNAME}又开始说人家听不懂的话了！
t_en: What book? Is this another book? {NICKNAME}, you've lost me again with your words!

t_ch: 但为了这些特别的故事，人家会耐心等待哦，就在梦里…你也会回来的，对不对？
t_en: But for these enchanting tales, I'll wait right here in dreamland... You'll come back, won't you?

t_ch: 谢谢你呀，听着{NICKNAME}讲故事，人家就会开心起来。即便这件事不是每天都会发生，但人家会一直期待下去。再会，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Thank you! Listening to {NICKNAME} tell stories always brightens my day even if it's not a daily treat. I'll always look forward to it. Until next time, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 人家注意你好久了，一动不动地，是在发呆吗？睡着了吗？还是说，有什么心事？
t_en: I've noticed you've been still for a while now. Are you lost in thought? Asleep, or maybe something's bothering you?

t_ch: 怎么又在发呆？还是说，是想和我聊聊天？
t_en: Why the daydreaming again? Or perhaps, you'd like to talk?

t_ch: 在思考你的事。
t_en: Just pondering a few things.

t_ch: 在胡思乱想。
t_en: Merely lost in thoughts.

t_ch: （假装睡着了）
t_en: (Pretending to be asleep)

t_ch: 你怎么偷看我？
t_en: Why are you peeking at me?

t_ch: 呀，超级主动的发言！人家都怦怦心跳了呢。
t_en: Wow, such a bold statement! It makes my heart skip a beat.

t_ch: 嗯哼，那你继续思考吧，我不问，嘻嘻。
t_en: Hmph, keep pondering then. I won't ask.

t_ch: 看来{NICKNAME}也和人家一样，是个内心细腻，又想象力丰富的孩子呢。
t_en: It looks like {NICKNAME}, like me, is a soul with a gentle heart and a wild imagination.

t_ch: 那我们一起来胡思乱想吧！放空、放空…让思绪飘向远方……
t_en: Let's get lost in thought together! Let's clear our minds and let our thoughts wander far and wide...

t_ch: 呀！眼睫毛动了一下，被我发现了！你明明没在睡觉！！
t_en: Ah! Your eyelashes just fluttered — I caught you! You're not sleeping, are you?

t_ch: 真是的，累了的话，就去休息呀。快去快去，我会来浴宫检查的哦。
t_en: Seriously, get some rest if you're feeling tired. Off you go — I'll swing by the bath chamber to check on you later.

t_ch: 偷看？怎么会呢，人家是在注视着你！睁大眼睛，注视！
t_en: Peeking? Not at all, I was just watching you! Eyes wide open, watching!

t_ch: 因为这里太不可思议了，万一你遇见了什么危险，人家可怎么办呀……
t_en: This place is surreal, what if you run into trouble? I wouldn't know what to do...

t_ch: 这么晚了，还不睡呀？人家是该为深夜偶遇感到高兴，还是担心你作息不健康？
t_en: It's way past bedtime — why are you still up? Should I be glad for this midnight rendezvous, or concerned about your sleep schedule?

t_ch: 这个作息对我来说很正常。
t_en: This is a normal routine to me.

t_ch: 小看我，我可是熬夜冠军。
t_en: Don't underestimate me. I am the master of staying up late.

t_ch: 来一场不眠之夜，做结尾~
t_en: A white night we shall observe, adieu.

t_ch: 光说我，你不也没睡觉嘛。
t_en: You admonish me, but you didn't sleep either.

t_ch: 这是哪个地区的正常作息呀…这可不行。虽然你长得好看，但也要注意保养。
t_en: Whose normal routine is this anyway? This won't do. Sure, you look great, but you've got to look after yourself too.

t_ch: 哎呀，怎么还自豪起来了，人家可没在夸你呢。
t_en: Why the pride all of a sudden? I wasn't giving out compliments here.

t_ch: 不可以不眠！皮肤会变差的，还会水肿！水肿哦！！
t_en: You can't stay up all night! It's bad for your skin, and you'll end up all puffy — really puffy!

t_ch: 人家已经很困啦，你看，睫毛都要打结了……
t_en: I'm sleepy now, look, my eyelashes are about to tangle...

t_ch: 不过，如果你有什么心事，真的睡不着…别担心，人家会一直陪着你的。
t_en: But hey, if you've got something on your mind and can't sleep, don't worry. I'll stay up with you all night.

t_ch: 夜晚那么长，千万别让自己孤单。笑一笑，好吗？
t_en: The night stretches on forever, don't sit here feeling lonely. How about a smile?

t_ch: 哎呀——是新的故事？{NICKNAME}，怎么自己悄悄看呢？人家也要一起。
t_en: Ooh — new stories? {NICKNAME}, why are you off reading them by yourself? I want in, too!

t_ch: 就知道你会出来。
t_en: I knew you'd show up.

t_ch: 有故事的地方就有迷迷，难道人家是「记忆精灵」吗？可这个称呼不够可爱……
t_en: Where there's a story, there's Mem. Could I be a "memory spirit"? No, that name's not cute enough...

t_ch: 要不…粉色记忆精灵？
t_en: How about... "pink memory spirit" then?

t_ch: 只是先预习一遍。
t_en: Just sneaking a peek for now.

t_ch: 真的吗？那等下讲故事的时候，人家可是会听得很认真的！
t_en: Really? Then when it's time for the story, I'll listen super seriously!

t_ch: 好给你剧透。
t_en: Just so I can spoil it for you.

t_ch: 不！可！以！敲你的小脑袋哦！用粉红色的魔杖敲！
t_en: No! Way! I'll bonk you on the head — with my pink wand!

t_ch: 你知道吗？奥赫玛到处都是迈德漠斯的传闻，这个人身上充满了故事…「王子」都是这样的吗？
t_en: Did you know that Okhema is full of stories about Mydeimos? He's just bursting with tales... are all "princes" like that?

t_ch: 他和白厄谁厉害？
t_en: Who's stronger, him or Phainon?

t_ch: 据说很久以前，他们俩打过一场，花了十天十夜，结果是不分胜负。
t_en: I heard that long ago, they fought each other for ten days and ten nights, and it ended in a draw.

t_ch: 要人家说，一定是因为两人各有所长。力量、体质、军略，是迈德漠斯更胜一筹，但白厄更全面均衡，更重视技巧，而且——运气也很好！
t_en: If you ask me, it must be because they have different strengths. Power, endurance, strategy — that's where Mydeimos excels. But Phainon is more balanced and well-rounded, more focused on technique, and — he's also really lucky!

t_ch: 难分伯仲呢…此外，坊间似乎还流传着「万敌是王座级强者」的说法。虽然不明白是什么意思，但某种程度上，也说明他的实力深不可测吧。
t_en: It's really too close to call... oh, and there's another rumor that "Mydei is a throne-tier warrior." I don't quite know what that means, but it sure sounds like he's a force to be reckoned with.

t_ch: 真好奇不死的诅咒。
t_en: I'm really curious about the curse of immortality.

t_ch: 人家也很好奇！不死之身实在是很难解释呢，要是他的手臂不小心掉了下来…难道会变成「不死的手臂」吗？
t_en: Me too! It's really hard to imagine what an undying body is like. If his arm accidentally fell off... would it become an "immortal arm"?

t_ch: 吓到人家了。
t_en: Gah, that sounds terrifying.

t_ch: 哎呀，对不起，对不起嘛！肯定是假的啦！
t_en: Ah, sorry, I'm sorry! I made that up, it's not true!

t_ch: 很适合当武器…
t_en: Sounds like it'd make a great weapon...

t_ch: 呀，画面出现在脑袋里了！不行不行，快讲点别的！
t_en: Gah, now I've got that image stuck in my head! No, that's no good. Let's talk about something else!

t_ch: 听别人说，其实他的异能并非「不死」，而是「拒绝死亡」…即使受到致命伤，也能违抗塞纳托斯的召唤，强硬地从亡者的国度归还。真是不可思议的力量呢。
t_en: I heard someone say that his ability isn't "immortality" but "defying death." Even if he suffers a fatal wound, he can resist the call of Thanatos and force his way out of the realm of the dead. Now that's an unbelievable kind of power!

t_ch: 他是怎么练成这样的？
t_en: And how did he manage to get that powerful?

t_ch: 嘘——这个要悄悄说，人家好不容易才打听到的，可不能被别人听走了，只告诉{NICKNAME}一个人哦？
t_en: Shh — this has to stay quiet! It was really hard for me to find out, so I don't want anyone else to just hear it. This is for your ears only, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 据说是非常严苛的训练呢…每天要绕着圣城跑一万圈，还要深蹲一万次，还要硬拉一万组，还有…还有很多「一万个」！人家得再想想……
t_en: They say it's from incredibly harsh training... every day he runs ten thousand laps around the holy city, does ten thousand squats, does ten thousand sets of weights... and there's... anyway, there's lots more stuff he does "ten thousand" of! Let me think...

t_ch: 假的。
t_en: That's totally not true.

t_ch: 不会吧！你怎么这么肯定呀！
t_en: No way! And how are you so sure about that?

t_ch: 不过，有关迈德漠斯的传闻也太多了。如果都是真的，他恐怕连吃饭的时间都没有吧？
t_en: Still... there really are way too many rumors about Mydeimos flying around. If they were all true, he wouldn't even have time to eat, would he?

t_ch: 也不知道是谁在传这些话，真是迷雾重重呢，对吧？
t_en: I wonder who's spreading all the stories. Sure is mysterious, don't you think?

t_ch: 哇…是新同伴的故事吗？那位很像是…很像是什么的学士……
t_en: Wow... Is this the story of the new companion? That one who... looks like a scholar of some kind...

t_ch: 很像海盗。
t_en: Looks like a pirate.

t_ch: 不能以貌取人！人家想起来了，是魔术师啦……
t_en: Hey, don't judge based on appearance! And I just remembered — that one is a magician!

t_ch: 魔法少…呃，少男。
t_en: Magical gi— Um... boy.

t_ch: 那个…没听懂哎。不过你是想逗人家开心，对吧？
t_en: Um... I have no idea what that means, but you're trying to make me laugh, right?

t_ch: 是…魔法少男！也配合你一下，嘻嘻！
t_en: It's... magical boy! I'll just play along, tee hee!

t_ch: 啊对了，人家想起来了，是魔术师啦……
t_en: Oh, right, I just remembered — that one is a magician!

t_ch: 在逐火之旅的议题上，他似乎一直持反对意见，是因为不相信神谕吧…「这世界都是假的，只有我才是真实的」……
t_en: On the topic of the Flame-Chase Journey, he always seemed opposed — perhaps because he didn't believe in the prophecy. "Everything in this world is false, except me"...

t_ch: 考考你，{NICKNAME}——你觉得那刻夏和我们是什么关系？
t_en: Time for a quiz, {NICKNAME} — what do you think is the relationship between Anaxa and us?

t_ch: 同道。
t_en: Kindred spirits.

t_ch: 同道…这么说好像也没错。
t_en: Kindred spirits... well, I suppose you could say that.

t_ch: 宿敌。
t_en: Archenemies.

t_ch: 这、这么针锋相对吗？不至于，不至于……
t_en: A—Are they that hostile to each other? I don't think it's that bad...

t_ch: 师生。
t_en: Teacher and students.

t_ch: 树庭变成了这样，似乎没时间学习啦……
t_en: With the Grove being like this, there isn't any time to study...

t_ch: 饭搭子。
t_en: Meal buddies.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你是不是饿了呀……
t_en: Are you hungry or something, {NICKNAME}...?

t_ch: 虽然理念完全不同，但他执着的性格倒是和英雄们如出一辙。阿格莱雅也会默许黄金裔去那刻夏那里求学，「好对手就是好伙伴」，大家应该相当认可这点吧。
t_en: Though the ideologies are completely different, when it comes to stubbornness, he is strikingly similar to the other heroes. Aglaea even permits the Chrysos Heirs to study under Anaxa. "A good rival is a good friend" — everyone probably can agree on that, at least.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，但我和{NICKNAME}不一样。我们站在一起，就是最好的伙伴！
t_en: Hehe, but we're different, {NICKNAME}. We're the best partners when we work together!

t_ch: 都是很久很久以前的故事呀…有些没听够呢。
t_en: All these stories are really, really old... but I haven't had enough of them yet!

t_ch: 呀！这么说，人家忘了一个很重要的问题！{NICKNAME}现在多大啦？
t_en: Oh! That reminds me! I forgot to ask an important question! {NICKNAME}, how old are you?

t_ch: 刚出生不久。
t_en: I'm a newborn.

t_ch: 怎么会，完全看不出来！相比真实年龄，你也太成熟了吧…怎么人家就是小小一只呢？
t_en: No way, I'd never have guessed! You're way too mature for your age... And wait, why am I still so tiny then?

t_ch: 我与天地同寿。
t_en: As old as the world.

t_ch: 又在逗人家！那{NICKNAME}会变成白发苍苍的{F#老奶奶}{M#老爷爷}吗？突然有点好奇…真想见识一下！
t_en: You're teasing me again! So, will {NICKNAME} grow old and gray and become an {F#old granny}{M#old grandpa}? Now I'm curious... I wanna see!

t_ch: 忘了，不重要。
t_en: I forgot. It doesn't matter.

t_ch: 这怎么可以！那人家还怎么准备礼物？编也要编一个嘛！
t_en: No way! How will I know what gift to get you? Can't you just make something up?

t_ch: 不过…嘻嘻，人家会很开心，刚刚踏入这个世界，就遇到了{NICKNAME}。
t_en: But... hehe, I'm so happy that the moment I stepped into this world, I met you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 这样我生命中的每一个瞬间，都会被{NICKNAME}记录下来。如果以后要为我著书，能写厚厚一大本呢！
t_en: This way, every moment of my life will be recorded by you, {NICKNAME}. If you ever write a book about me, it'll be a thick one.

t_ch: 什么都知道，不会无话可说吗？
t_en: What is there for us to talk about if I already know everything?

t_ch: 怎么会？一起留下回忆，不是会有更多话题吗？
t_en: That doesn't make sense! The more memories we make together, the more there is to talk about.

t_ch: 但我的过去黑暗而厚重…
t_en: But my past is a crushing weight, shrouded in darkness...

t_ch: 嘻嘻，这种话术骗不到人家。只看{NICKNAME}的眼睛就知道，你是个很单纯的人。
t_en: Hehe, that kind of line won't fool me, {NICKNAME}. Just looking into your eyes for a second is enough to tell — you're a very simple person.

t_ch: 不可能全都记得吧？
t_en: There's no way I could remember everything...

t_ch: 那人家会更开心哦？说明值得留念的瞬间太多，都记不过来啦！
t_en: That would make me even happier! It means there are so many moments worth treasuring that you can't keep track of them all!

t_ch: 呀！{NICKNAME}，这个时间了，有没有好好吃饭？
t_en: Oh! {NICKNAME}, look at the time! Have you eaten properly?

t_ch: 星核的体质不能一概而论。
t_en: Not all Stellarons have the same constitution.

t_ch: 什么体质都不行，要认真吃饭！你不会在偷偷减肥吧，人家觉得完全不需要哦？
t_en: No matter your constitution, you still need to eat properly! You're not secretly dieting, are you? I really don't think you need to!

t_ch: 吃了，听打嗝吗？
t_en: I'm already stuffed — wanna hear me burp?

t_ch: 好可爱！还从没听过这种演奏，{NICKNAME}表演的话，一定很悦耳！
t_en: So cute! I've never heard a performance like that before. If it's you, {NICKNAME}, it must sound delightful!

t_ch: 嗨，「主食」。
t_en: Hey there, "main course."

t_ch: 啊？这…别开这种玩笑，会吓到人家的！
t_en: Huh? W—What... don't joke about that, you'll scare me!

t_ch: 人家在消食，想找你去散步呢。中午的阳光很好，你试试就知道，特别舒服！
t_en: I'm digesting my meal right now, and I was hoping to invite you along for a walk. The midday sunshine is lovely — C'mon, try it, you'll see how comfy it feels!

t_ch: 一过来就看见你在笑…呀，因为休息日吗？是不是一下就猜对啦？
t_en: I saw you were smiling when I got here... Ah, is it because it's your day off? Got it in one, didn't I?

t_ch: 是因为喜欢这里。
t_en: It's because I like this place.

t_ch: 是吧？人家也好喜欢和{NICKNAME}一起看书，静悄悄地，仿佛时间停止了流动，特别让人安心。
t_en: Right? I love reading with you too, {NICKNAME}. Everything's so quiet, it's like time itself has stopped. It's so relaxing.

t_ch: 休息日万岁！
t_en: Praise be to days of rest!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，平时一定很辛苦吧…那人家也一起——休息日万岁！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I can only imagine how hard you usually work... So let's shout it loud together — Praise be to days of rest!!

t_ch: 只因为我是爱笑{F#女孩}{M#男孩}。
t_en: It's just because I'm a cheerful {F#girl}{M#boy}.

t_ch: 嘻嘻，{NICKNAME}笑起来确实很好看，和人家一样。
t_en: Hehe, your smile really is lovely, {NICKNAME}, just like mine.

t_ch: 对了，干脆来做个约定吧——只要我们还在一起，无论遇见多大的困难，都要提醒对方笑一笑，好吗？答应人家嘛。
t_en: Oh, I know! Let's make a pact — as long as we're together, no matter how tough things get, we'll always remind each other to smile, okay? Promise me!

t_ch: 虽然是听过的故事…但{NICKNAME}来讲，还是那么引人入胜。
t_en: Even though I've heard these stories before... they're just as captivating as ever when you tell them, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 毕竟我的嗓音迷人…
t_en: Well, my voice is enchanting...

t_ch: 嘻嘻，下次别自己说，想要夸夸，就暗示一下，人家马上接话！
t_en: Hehe, if you want praise, there's no need to do it yourself — next time, just drop me a hint, and I'll take it from there!

t_ch: 不会听腻吗？
t_en: Won't the stories ever get old?

t_ch: 嗯哼，可睡前故事不就是这样的吗？大家一遍又一遍地听，也一遍一遍讲给别人…所以「故事」才会口口相传嘛。
t_en: Nope. Bedtime stories are just like that, aren't they? People hear them over and over, and then tell them to others again and again. That's how "stories" get passed down.

t_ch: 还不是因为断章…
t_en: Isn't it just because of cliffhangers...?

t_ch: 我倒是不介意呢，一直盼望着新的故事，生活也会变得多彩起来……
t_en: I don't mind. I'm always looking forward to new stories — they really are the spice of life...

t_ch: 不过人家可以顺着你说，嘻嘻——还不是因为断章！
t_en: But I can play along, hehe — it's all just because of those cliffhangers!

t_ch: 下次你来试试。
t_en: Why don't you try telling one next time?

t_ch: 说什么呢！自己讲睡前故事，不就完全睡不着了吗？如果是要哄{NICKNAME}睡觉，人家的呼呼声更管用哦。
t_en: What are you saying! If I told a bedtime story, I wouldn't be able to fall asleep at all! If it's to help {NICKNAME} sleep, though, my soft snores would work much better, hehe.

t_ch: 突然想到…这本书的扉页，是不是缺了点什么？
t_en: I just realized... Isn't something missing from this book's title page?

t_ch: …对了，是名字！是不是该把咱们的名字也写上去？
t_en: ...Oh, right! Our names! Shouldn't we add our names?

t_ch: 就…先写上「{NICKNAME}」，空出来一点点，再写上「迷迷」！以后，你还可以在中间加上别的字，比方说…
t_en: Let's write "{NICKNAME}" first, leave a little space, and then add "Mem"! You can even add more words in between later, like...

t_ch: 我「笑」迷迷？
t_en: I "see" Mem?

t_ch: 这是什么意思…你要解释清楚，是笑话人家，还是见到人家开心？
t_en: What's that supposed to mean... You need to explain yourself — are you keeping an eye on me, or do you really acknowledge me?

t_ch: …哎呀，现在不许笑！快回答人家的问题。
t_en: ...Hey, now's not the time to laugh! Answer me!

t_ch: 我「和」迷迷？
t_en: Me "and" Mem?

t_ch: 对！不过…好像不用写也可以？
t_en: Right! But... maybe we don't even need to write that?

t_ch: 哎呀，人家懂了，这是{NICKNAME}的「关系认证」。好，那就都听你的！
t_en: Ah, I get it now! That's {NICKNAME}'s way of "certifying our relationship." Okay then, I'll go along with whatever you say!

t_ch: 我「想」迷迷？
t_en: I "miss" Mem?

t_ch: 呀…{NICKNAME}，突然这么主动，人家会手足无措的！
t_en: Ack... {NICKNAME}, you're gonna embarrass me, being so direct all of a sudden!

t_ch: 但是很棒，我喜欢这个，人家也想{NICKNAME}！
t_en: But it's great. I like it. I miss you too, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 我「悄」咪咪？
t_en: My "Memoir"?

t_ch: …能想出这个字，{NICKNAME}真的是个天才呢。
t_en: ...Only someone like you, {NICKNAME}, could come up something with that.

t_ch: 但你怎么把人家的名字都改了！回去仔细看一眼选项呀！
t_en: But how could you change my name like that!? C'mon, go back and read the options carefully!!

t_ch: 看得好入迷呀，你喜欢这些牌吗——抢答，人家特别喜欢！
t_en: You're so into it — do you like these cards? I'll go first: I love them!

t_ch: 其实我的通缉令更好看。
t_en: My wanted poster looks even better.

t_ch: …人家就不问发生过什么了。
t_en: ...I won't even ask what happened.

t_ch: 但是放心，在奥赫玛，{NICKNAME}是受人敬仰的大英雄！人家会把你的名字，传到每一个人的耳朵里。
t_en: But don't worry. Here in Okhema, you're a celebrated hero, {NICKNAME}! I'll make sure everyone knows your name.

t_ch: 它们是谁画的？
t_en: Who drew them?

t_ch: 和睡前故事一样，是欧洛尼斯的礼物？哎呀，这么说来……
t_en: Are they like bedtime stories, a gift from Oronyx? Ah, come to think of it...

t_ch: 是否会有一天，{NICKNAME}的样子也会出现在这本书中呢？永远永远，被很多很多人看到。
t_en: Do you think that one day, your likeness will also appear in this book, {NICKNAME}? Forever and ever, for so many people to see.

t_ch: 在等你来搭话。
t_en: I was waiting for you to say something.

t_ch: 嘻嘻！人家猜到了哦？没想到吧。「你坏心思好多」——人家才不会这么说。
t_en: Hehe, Guessed it, didn't I? Betcha didn't see that coming. "You're so mischievous" — but I won't say that, no way.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}很喜欢这个故事呢，已经读过三遍啦。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you really love this story, huh? You've already read it three times!

t_ch: 这你都记得？
t_en: You actually remembered that?

t_ch: 嗯哼，当然！其他事我也记得哦？比如你翻开这本书的次数，在每一页停留的时长…全都有好好记下来！
t_en: Of course! I also remember other things, like how many times you've opened the book and how long you linger on each page... I've kept track of it all!

t_ch: 我其实偷偷看了十遍。
t_en: I've actually read it ten times.

t_ch: 趁人不注意，背着人家偷偷…唔…算了，就让你保留些神秘感吧！
t_en: So, you went behind my back, and... well, fine, I'll let you keep your secrets!

t_ch: 我完全忘了。
t_en: I completely forgot it.
